message.content:
@startuml
participant "User" as U1
participant "User" as U2
participant "CLI" as CLI1
participant "CLI" as CLI2
participant "Model Spec" as MS
participant "Database Spec" as DBS
participant "Database" as DB

U1 ..> CLI1 : $>gaa update model
CLI1 ..> MS : Read model spec file
CLI1 ..> DBS : Read database spec file
CLI1 ..> DB : Create or update table

U2 ..> CLI2 : $>gaa update model
CLI2 ..> MS : Read model spec file
CLI2 ..> DBS : Read database spec file
CLI2 ..> DB : Create or update table

@enduml
